scenario: Connecting flight cancelled due to weather; customer needs to arrive at destination by tomorrow morning for a wedding.
Checked baggage missing on arrival; flight landed two hours ago and the bag did not appear at the carousel.
Customer wants a refund on a non-refundable ticket due to a documented medical emergency.
Customer is unsure why their loyalty status was downgraded this year and wants to understand the qualifying criteria.
Customer wants to change a fare class on an existing booking and needs to know the fare difference and any change fees.
Flight is showing a four-hour delay and the customer wants to know whether they will make their connection.
Customer was double-charged for a seat upgrade and wants the duplicate charge reversed.
Customer needs to add a service animal to an upcoming international flight and wants to know what documentation is required.
Bag damaged in transit; customer needs to file a claim and wants the timeline and required documentation.
Customer rebooked through self-service and is now seated apart from a travel companion; they want to be reseated together.
Customer wants to use a travel credit from a previous cancellation but cannot find the credit number in their account.
Customer's payment method was declined when trying to complete a booking and they want to know what to do.
